name: LINE-AD emtricitabine Alzheimer disease registry
summary: Recruiting randomized double-blind placebo-controlled phase 1 study of daily 200 mg emtricitabine in biomarker-confirmed MCI or mild to moderate Alzheimer disease, with safety, inflammatory, cognitive, functional, and CSF biomarker endpoints and no posted results.
population: Adults and older adults aged 50 to 85 years with biomarker-confirmed MCI or mild to moderate Alzheimer disease

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry record lists Mar. 31, 2026 as the study end date, but no posted results were present in the Jun. 6, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: A near-term registry or publication update would be useful, but this is an Alzheimer disease study rather than broad aging proof.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether transposon-control approaches have human safety, inflammatory, cognitive, functional, or CSF biomarker signals.
